sentences.arabic: فِي رَأْيِي، مِنَ الْمُهِمِّ أَنْ نَحْتَرِمَ رَأْيَ الْآخَرِينَ.
sentences.translation: Po mom mišljenju, važno je poštovati mišljenje drugih.
sentences.translationEn: In my opinion, it is important to respect others' opinions.

sentences.arabic: لَيْسَ كُلُّ النَّاسِ يُفَكِّرُونَ بِنَفْسِ الطَّرِيقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Nisu svi ljudi koji razmišljaju na isti način.
sentences.translationEn: Not all people think in the same way.

sentences.arabic: الِاخْتِلَافُ فِي الرَّأْيِ لَا يَعْنِي الِاخْتِلَافَ فِي الْقَلْبِ.
sentences.translation: Razlika u mišljenju ne znači razliku u srcu.
sentences.translationEn: Difference in opinion does not mean difference in heart.

sentences.arabic: يُمْكِنُنَا أَنْ نَتَحَدَّثَ بِهُدُوءٍ حَتَّى لَوِ اخْتَلَفْنَا.
sentences.translation: Možemo mirno razgovarati čak i kada se ne slažemo.
sentences.translationEn: We can talk calmly even if we disagree.
